chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1460 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 21.11.2016. Mr. Muhammad Jabbar Shaikh, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Altaf Hussain Chandio, Advocate for respondents No.1,2 & 4 Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G. -.-.-. Both Counsel, who are present alongwith parties, have stated that parties have compromised the matter and the custody of two minor children residing with respondent No.1 Mst. Ameer Zadi will be handed over to applicant in terms of order dated 25.02.2016 passed by learned Guardian Judge, which is available at Page-55 of the petition. Consequently, this petition is in view of above compromise and observations stands disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
